characters.appearance: Young woman, medium build, fair complexion. She has dark hair tied back. Her facial features are soft and expressive.
characters.wardrobe: Long-sleeved pink top and dark blue jeans.
characters.demeanor: Relaxed, slightly hesitant but eager to learn.

characters.appearance: Young man, fair complexion, dark curly hair. He has a clean-shaven face and a neutral expression.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Hello. [Hello.]
Character A says: Hello... um... आगे क्या बोलूं? [Hello... um... what should I say next?]
Character B says: How are you, Neha? [How are you, Neha?]
Character A says: I am... मैं ठीक हूँ। [I am... I am fine.]
Character B says: कोई बात नहीं, ऐसे बोलो: I am good. [No worries, say it like this: I am good.]
Character A says: I am good. [I am good.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes a highly relatable scenario of a learner freezing up or hesitating while trying to speak English.
- Demonstrates the core value of the AI tutor: providing a safe, judgment-free space with gentle, real-time corrections.
- Delivers an emotional payoff as the learner successfully repeats the correct phrase, building confidence.

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: Supernova ऐप के साथ लाखों लोग रोज़ इंग्लिश बोलने की practice कर रहे हैं। [Lakhs of people are practicing speaking English daily with the Supernova app.]
Unknown speaker says: बिना डरे इंग्लिश बोलना सीखें। [Learn to speak English without fear.]
Unknown speaker says: आज ही अपनी learning journey शुरू करें। [Start your learning journey today.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Transitions to the app interface to provide strong social proof (millions of learners).
- Reinforces the brand's encouraging, older-sibling tone ('learn without fear').
- Ends with a clear, practical call-to-action to download and start practicing, without relying on gimmicky pricing.
